description_long: This is a large, two-story detached house set within a fenced rectangular lot, featuring a prominent front driveway and garage. The house exterior combines light-colored stone or brick with dark, steeply pitched gable roofs, and multiple dormer windows. The front yard is landscaped with shrubs and a driveway leading to a double garage, while the backyard is expansive with a lawn, a swimming pool, a patio area, and several trees and garden features. The rear facade has large windows and a terrace, providing views and access to the backyard amenities. The property is bordered by a dark fence and includes decorative elements such as flower beds and hedges. The overall design suggests a blend of traditional and modern suburban architectural influences.
description: A spacious two-story house with a gabled roof, stone exterior, attached garage, landscaped front yard, and a backyard featuring a pool and patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, double garage, driveway, and landscaped front yard with shrubs and a fence.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, side windows, and a partial view of the backyard with trees and pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large backyard, swimming pool, patio, terrace, and extensive lawn with garden features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side elevation, backyard amenities, and additional landscaping details.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large rear windows and dormers
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with steps, covered porch, and decorative columns flanked by windows and garage
